group_by.note: 3 l_returnflag values x 2 l_linestatus values = 6 groups max; index = returnflag_id * 2 + linestatus_id

order_by.note: Only 6 groups — trivial sort after aggregation, O(1) effectively

data_structures.aggregation: flat_array[6] of struct{sum_qty, sum_base_price, sum_disc_price, sum_charge, sum_qty_for_avg, sum_price_for_avg, sum_disc_for_avg, count} per thread — direct-indexed by (returnflag_id * 2 + linestatus_id)
data_structures.thread_local_accumulators: 64 x flat_array[6] — no synchronization during scan phase
data_structures.final_merge: sequential merge of 64 x 6-entry arrays into 1 x 6-entry global result

parallelism.note: Each thread owns thread-local flat_array[6]. No locks during scan. Single sequential merge pass after all threads finish.

index_usage.layout: [uint32_t num_zones] then per zone: [int32_t min, int32_t max, uint32_t count, uint32_t offset] (16B/zone)
index_usage.note: Data sorted by l_shipdate so trailing zones with min > cutoff are skippable

columns_loaded: l_discount (int64_t) — aggregate: SUM, AVG; used in disc_price and charge
fused_operations: 1. Load zone map, identify qualifying zones
2. For each qualifying zone morsel: load l_shipdate block, apply filter predicate (l_shipdate <= 10471)
3. For qualifying rows: load group keys (l_returnflag, l_linestatus), compute group index
4. Load aggregate columns and compute: sum_qty, sum_base_price, sum_disc_price = ep*(100-disc)/100, sum_charge = ep*(100-disc)*(100+tax)/10000, count
scan_detail.note: All 7 columns loaded in single coordinated pass per morsel. No intermediate materialization.

memory_detail.access_pattern: Sequential columnar reads per zone/morsel; cache-friendly block-at-a-time access
memory_detail.working_set_per_thread: morsel_size * 7_columns * avg_bytes ≈ 100K * (4+2+2+8+8+8+8) = ~40MB per thread morsel (streamed, not resident)
memory_detail.aggregation_state_size: 6 groups * ~64 bytes per group = 384 bytes per thread — fits in L1 cache

decimal_arithmetic.sum_disc_price: SUM(l_extendedprice * (100 - l_discount)) / 100  [integer arithmetic, divide at output]
decimal_arithmetic.sum_charge: SUM(l_extendedprice * (100 - l_discount) * (100 + l_tax)) / 1000000  [integer arithmetic, divide at output]
decimal_arithmetic.avg_qty: sum_qty / count  [l_quantity scale=1, no scaling needed]

dictionary_handling.l_returnflag: Read dictionary file lineitem/l_returnflag_dict.txt at startup to map int16_t -> char; used for output only
dictionary_handling.l_linestatus: Read dictionary file lineitem/l_linestatus_dict.txt at startup; used for output only
dictionary_handling.group_index_computation: group_idx = returnflag_code * 2 + linestatus_code; direct array index, O(1)

breakdown.parallel_scan_59M_rows_7_cols: ~65ms — 59M * 40 bytes / 64 threads at ~600MB/s effective HDD throughput
breakdown.thread_local_aggregation: ~0ms — 6-entry flat array always in L1 cache

estimated_cost.target_vs_duckdb: Beat DuckDB (83ms) by ~15% via specialized flat-array aggregation (no hash overhead) and morsel-driven 64-thread parallelism
estimated_cost.bottleneck: HDD I/O bandwidth — 59M rows * 7 columns * ~5 bytes avg = ~2.1GB data read
